treatment_information.treatment_response: Concern for a pseudoaneurysm of her right groin access site closed by angioseal; duplex ultrasound confirmed no pseudoaneurysm or AV fistula.

treatment_timeline.event: Angioseal closure of right groin access site.
Duplex ultrasound showed normal right groin ultrasound with no pseudoaneurysm.
Presented with acute onset of right groin pain and observed new ecchymosis.
Groin ultrasound confirmed no hematoma, pseudoaneurysm, or AV fistula, but revealed a 1.4cm x 2mm blind ending tract from the puncture site.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow-up with the surgeon and Primary Care Provider as advised.
